ItemTypes.brief: An organized collection of constants that categorize and identify all item types within the game system.
ItemTypes.details: The ItemTypes group provides a comprehensive set of integer constants used to classify and distinguish various item categories in the game. These include fundamental objects such as weapons, armor, potions, and food, as well as specialized items like containers, corpses, and unique objects such as portals, warp stones, and quest shop items. This categorization supports consistent item management, interaction handling, and system organization by enabling the game to recognize and process different item types accurately. The constants serve as standardized identifiers used throughout the codebase for spawning, inventory operations, gameplay mechanics, and interaction logic, ensuring maintainability and clarity in how items are handled across various modules.
ItemTypes.notes: Organizational principles include grouping related items (e.g., NPC corpses vs. player corpses), and assigning specific constants to unique or special items (e.g., quest shop, warp crystals). This structure promotes clear, maintainable code and facilitates easy addition of new item types.
ItemTypes.rationale: This group exists to provide a centralized, standardized set of identifiers for all item types, enabling consistent handling, reducing errors, and simplifying the implementation of item-related features. It supports the system architecture by allowing different modules to recognize and process items based on their type efficiently, thereby enhancing code clarity and system extensibility.
ItemTypes.name: ItemTypes
